questions.question: What is the main advantage of using API Monitor over Process Monitor (ProcMon) for certain analysis tasks? (2-3 marks)
expectedPoints: API Monitor allows for selective monitoring of specific APIs and DLLs.
It decodes and displays function parameters in a human-readable format.
It provides a call stack showing the sequence of functions that led to the API call.

questions.question: Describe a typical dynamic analysis procedure using behavior monitoring tools, from sample preparation to IOC extraction. (5-10 marks)
expectedPoints: Preparation: Configure a safe, isolated sandbox environment (e.g., a VM) and take a snapshot.
Tool Setup: Launch relevant monitoring tools (e.g., ProcMon, Wireshark) and configure any necessary filters.
Monitoring: Allow the tools to capture all system and network activity during execution and for a short period after.
Analysis: Stop capturing and revert the VM. Analyze the logs, focusing on filtering out system noise.
Data Correlation: Look for related events across different tools (e.g., a file drop in ProcMon followed by a network call in Wireshark).
IOC Extraction: Document the malicious artifacts: file paths, registry keys, IP addresses, domain names, and mutexes.
